sources.attribution: Australian Biological Resources Study, Australian Faunal Directory; Department of Climate Change, Energy, the Environment and Water.
sources.scope_note: Checklist taxonomy only; no source images, logos, Coat of Arms, occurrence records, coordinates, or other third-party media are included.

sources.dataset: ALA Namematching API responses for the frozen AFD scope
sources.attribution: Atlas of Living Australia and Australian Faunal Directory, accessed 17 July 2026.
sources.scope_note: Taxon concepts, identifiers, ranks, classifications, and matcher diagnostics only; AFD provider terms are retained.

sources.dataset: ALA species-index name profiles for exact crosswalk concepts
sources.attribution: Atlas of Living Australia species index and the name authorities identified on each profile, including Australian Faunal Directory.
sources.scope_note: Selected taxon concepts, classifications, scientific synonyms, vernacular-name assertions, and source metadata only. Provider media arrays, occurrence records, coordinates, users, and downloaded images are excluded; each derived assertion retains its source response fingerprint.

sources.attribution: GBIF Backbone Taxonomy, matcher build created 9 July 2026, accessed 17 July 2026.
sources.scope_note: Public taxonomic names, identifiers, classifications, statuses, and matcher diagnostics only; no occurrence or media dataset content.

sources.attribution: iNaturalist Taxonomy, published 1 July 2026, accessed 17 July 2026.
sources.scope_note: The provider EML states that taxonomic information should not represent creative work and may not be subject to intellectual-property restrictions in many jurisdictions. Only factual taxon fields are extracted; no observations, users, vernacular-name files, or media.

sources.attribution: Australian Biological Resources Study/Australian Faunal Directory; Atlas of Living Australia; GBIF Backbone Taxonomy; iNaturalist Taxonomy.
sources.scope_note: Derived factual names and identifiers. Each provider source retains its own rights basis and exact snapshot receipt.
